## The easy way to naturally beautiful and younger-looking skin.

Only 2 minutes a day - feel freer, more spontaneous and more confident - the simplest skincare routine with visible anti-aging effect after just 3 weeks.

[Starter Set](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/en/products/starter-paket-fur-3-monate)[Test your skin type.](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/en/pages/teste-deinen-hauttyp)

## Natural cosmetics made in Germany

Our products uniquely combine natural active ingredients, simple application, and visible results – and the best part? A skin feeling you won't want to be without after just the first application. Finally, natural cosmetics that work but don't feel like natural cosmetics.

## This is what distinguishes our products.

![Image 24](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/)

## **Simple**

Achieve more with less thanks to study-based natural active ingredients.

![Image 25](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/)

## **Happy**

Mindfulness reduces stress and makes you happy. With us, this will become your new everyday life.

![Image 26](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/)

## **Honestly**

Try it out! With our 40-day money-back guarantee, you can get to know us without any risk.

![Image 27](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/)

## **Different**

More than just skincare. Mindfulness, self-love and a family business with heart from the Palatinate.

## Achievements that make us proud.

With more than 3000 satisfied customers, without investors but with hundreds of success stories.

![Image 28](https://dusa-and-kamen.com/)

Georgia T. (48)

Uneven skin, large pores, wrinkles

After just the first application, I had visibly finer pores, and after 3 weeks, I was completely thrilled.

I was worried at first that it wouldn't work again, but I'm just happy with the result.

verifiziertes Vorher-Nacher-Bild

Impurities, wrinkles around the mouth and eyes

The severe blemishes took a while, but it was worth it every day. I've been struggling with pimples since I was 14.

I've tried so many products and this is the first one that has helped in the long term.

verifiziertes Vorher-Nacher-Bild

dry patches, pimples, shiny forehead

I used to have a lot of products in my closet, but today I only use 3 and my skin is perfectly cared for and radiant.

I can recommend the products 100%.
